violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Employee did not wash his hands before returning to work after drinking from beverage. Hands should be washed after eating or drinking and upon returning to work.

General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Food employees were observed with no restraint in hair that is longer than shoulder length. Hair should be restrained in food service areas.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee beverages were found stored on shelving unit with food items used in the facility. Personal items should be stored separate from items used for food service.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Tuna salad was found in reach-in cooler at 44F. Potentially hazardous foods should be maintained at 41F or below. *Tuna was discarded during inspection.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
